description: OpenReplay is an open-source, self-hostable platform for session replay, co-browsing, and product analytics on web and mobile apps. It lets teams inspect user sessions, analyze behavior, and troubleshoot frontend issues with full data ownership.
summary: OpenReplay exposes a documented REST API authenticated by an Organization API Key, an MCP app for querying OpenReplay data from MCP hosts via browser-based login, and a self-hosted `openreplay` CLI.
